calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

Ms. Espey provided a request for and an order appointing Probate Referee, stated that language regarding bond in the Trust instrument was a scrivener's error, that this a different Trust/administrative Trust and referred to section 2.1 of the Trust document. The sale was confirmed at $1,185,000.00 to Michael O'Rourke based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is required. Amount of bond will be determined once Ms. Dolch verifies the amount owed on the reverse mortgage.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)
